note_text:
Pt seen for wound eval. Burn Left upper arm measures aprx 4.6 x 3.5cm, depth 0.1cm.
Min drainage serous. Heel wound also eval - L heel 2.8x2.1, 0.1cm deep, slight serous.
Both wounds cleaned w/ NS, covered. Will follow up Thu.

Subjective: Patient reports pain at Left upper arm wound site, rates 9/10.
Objective: Wound assessment performed. Burn burn Left upper arm measures 4.6 cm x 3.5 cm x 0.1 cm.
  Wound bed: 45% slough, 55% granulation tissue. Periwound: intact.
  Drainage: light. Odor: present, mild.
Assessment: Burn burn Left upper arm — improving.
Plan: Physician notified of wound progression. Nutritional consult ordered.
